name: @jamiehs/zoomies
description: Drop a fleet of misbehaved top-down race cars onto any web page. Click anywhere — they'll get there. Eventually.
author: Jamie Hamel-Smith <jamie3d@gmail.com>

scripts.release:patch: npm test && npm version patch && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm test && npm version minor && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm test && npm version major && git push origin main --tags
